name: The Approach

setup.description: From 130 yards, pick a green with a visible flag. Hit 10 approach shots at the pin.

rules.description: Play 10 approach shots from 130 yards. Each ball is judged on where it finishes, not how it looked getting there.
scoring: 1 point per ball that finishes on the green

caption: 130 yards, one number that matters: how many found the green. #golfable #golftok #golfpractice #loweryourhandicap
